title: Messi's sweet 16: Six World Cups, sixteen goals - A look at Leo's every goal
content: Leo Messi, once criticized for his World Cup record, has now equaled Miroslav Klose's 16-goal tally.  After a disappointing 2018, the 38-year-old is set to extend his lead over Kylian Mbappe. Messi also holds records as the oldest and youngest World Cup goal scorer for Argentina.

title: 'She was alive for 2 hrs': Ghaziabad man alleges hospital doors shut on 4-yr-old rape victim
content: A father's plea for accountability echoes after two hospitals allegedly refused to treat his critically injured 4-year-old daughter, who later died. The Supreme Court is hearing the case, questioning the hospitals' actions. The child was found bleeding hours after a brutal assault, with her father asserting timely medical care could have saved her life.

title: Anthropic CEO reaffirms warning that AI could eliminate millions of jobs
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is doubling down on his AI jobs warning. His forecast of a white-collar wipeout still held, and he hasn't changed his mind: "I'm still the same order of concern." The timing is awkward—Anthropic just filed for a near-$1 trillion IPO, sharpening critics' claim that his job-loss doomsaying is also a sales pitch to investors weighing Claude's true market

title: Ram Mandir donations under scrutiny: RJD MP sends legal notice amid irregularity allegations
content: The Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust has received a legal notice from an RJD MP demanding detailed disclosures on Ram Mandir donations and their expenditure. This follows allegations of financial irregularities, which the Trust has denied. Opposition leaders have called for an investigation and questioned the handling of funds.

title: 'Messi, Messi' chants follow Ronaldo after Portugal's draw against Congo - Watch
content: Cristiano Ronaldo faced a challenging start to his World Cup 2026 journey, failing to score for Portugal in a 1-1 draw. Following the match, Democratic Republic of the Congo fans chanted Lionel Messi's name, a stark contrast to Messi's recent hat-trick. Ronaldo, however, maintained his composure, responding with a smile and applause.

title: 'I call it deemocracy': Agnimitra Paul's swipe after series of egg attacks on TMC leaders
content: West Bengal witnesses a surge in egg-throwing incidents targeting Trinamool Congress leaders. BJP leader Agnimitra Paul calls this 'deemocracy', citing public anger over alleged corruption and misgovernance. Recent events include attacks on Kunal Ghosh and Soumitra Banerjee. Residents also targeted a vehicle linked to Madan Mitra. These protests highlight growing public dissatisfaction with the ruling party.

title: Dell CEO Michael Dell makes one of largest public university donations in US history
content: Michael Dell has gifted a staggering $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin, propelling the creation of a groundbreaking AI-native hospital and research campus. This substantial donation, adding to his family's legacy of support, will also bolster scholarships, advanced computing, and vital medical research, underscoring Dell's enduring connection to his alma mater.

title: Ukrainian drones strike Moscow’s oil refinery again; flames, thick plumes of smoke seen
content: Moscow's oil refinery in Kapotnya was hit by a Ukrainian drone attack on Thursday, causing visible flames and smoke. This incident follows earlier drone strikes on Russian energy infrastructure, contributing to a growing fuel shortage. Meanwhile, Russia launched its own attacks on Kyiv and Sumy.  Ukrainian President Zelenskyy discussed war-ending strategies with global leaders.

title: Qatar LNG tanker sails for Hormuz as Middle East peace returns
content: An LNG tanker, the Mraikh, is approaching the Strait of Hormuz after loading cargo in Qatar, signaling a potential increase in shipping activity following a US-Iran interim peace agreement. This development could ease Pakistan's gas shortage and restore global LNG supplies, which were restricted by the waterway's closure.

title: FIFA World Cup: Ronaldo joins Messi in an exclusive club despite Portugal setback
content: Cristiano Ronaldo achieved a historic sixth World Cup appearance, joining Lionel Messi in an elite club. However, this milestone was overshadowed by Portugal's disappointing 1-1 draw against DR Congo. The veteran forward had a quiet game, struggling to make an impact and extending his major tournament goal drought to ten matches, raising concerns about his current form.

title: What Morris Chang said on AI layoffs this year
content: TSMC founder Morris Chang warns against layoffs, highlighting hidden costs like severance and retraining that often outweigh savings. He advises companies to avoid job cuts if rehiring within a year is likely. Chang shared TSMC's difficult experience with performance-based layoffs in 2009, which led to protests and ultimately rehiring, stressing the importance of careful workforce management.

title: 'Save your MPs': Rajbhar's fresh warning to Akhilesh amid split buzz within the Samajwadi Party
content: Uttar Pradesh minister Om Prakash Rajbhar claims the Samajwadi Party is on the verge of a split, citing internal dissent and a recent Brahmin conference incident. The ruling BJP supports his claims, alleging several SP MPs are ready to defect, while the SP dismisses the allegations as a diversionary tactic ahead of the 2027 elections.

title: Rupee slips again: Currency tumbles 21 paise to 94.66 against US dollar
content: The Indian Rupee weakened against the US dollar on Thursday, influenced by the US Federal Reserve's hawkish stance and a strengthening dollar index. Asian currencies also saw declines, impacting the rupee. Meanwhile, positive sentiment emerged from reports of a US-Iran memorandum of understanding and progress on a US-India trade agreement.

title: Harry Kane and Kate Goodland turned a childhood romance Into marriage
content: Harry Kane enters his third World Cup as England's captain and all-time top scorer, fresh off a 36-goal Bundesliga season with Bayern Munich. Away from the pitch, his wife Katie Goodland has been part of his story since childhood. The pair met at age four in Chingford, started dating as teenagers in 2011, and married in 2019. A qualified fitness coach with a Sports Science degree, Goodland now balances her own career with raising their four children while supporting Kane through England's latest push to end six decades of World Cup hurt.

title: Crissy Froyd claims Mike Silver liked old bikini photos after Russini Story Row
content: Crissy Froyd has accused The Athletic's Mike Silver of liking old bikini photos on her Instagram immediately after she published a column about the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini scandal, alleging the behaviour was targeted. Froyd, who was previously fired from USA Today Sports over her criticism of Russini, has alleged that at least six female reporters admitted to her that they traded intimacy for NFL access. Meanwhile, Russini has resigned from The Athletic, which is now conducting an internal investigation.

title: New claim about Jorge Messi’s health reframes Lionel Messi’s World Cup Tears
content: Lionel Messi revealed that his emotional reaction after Argentina’s World Cup win was unrelated to football. According to comments made by journalist Eduardo Feinmann on Radio Mitre, concerns about the health of Messi’s father, Jorge Messi, may have been behind the tears. Despite the personal situation, Messi starred in Argentina’s 3-0 victory over Algeria.

title: Visa approved! Cape Verde hero Vozinha set for emotional reunion with mother
content: Cape Verdean goalkeeper Josimar 'Vozinha' Dias will be reunited with his mother at the FIFA World Cup 2026 match against Uruguay in Miami. US authorities expedited visa arrangements after Vozinha expressed his disappointment that his mother couldn't attend his historic debut due to complications. This heartwarming development follows his heroic performance against Spain.

title: From TVs to wallpapers: What tenants can legally alter in a rented home
content: Moving into a new rental? Personalising your space has legal limits. The Transfer of Property Act, 1882, allows tenants to make temporary, reversible changes such as installing appliances or hanging decor. However, permanent alterations or significant modifications require landlord consent. Always document any agreed-upon changes in writing to avoid disputes.

title: ‘I am afraid to take the test again’: NEET aspirant dies by suicide in Coimbatore
content: A 19-year-old NEET aspirant died by suicide in Coimbatore, citing fear and mental strain after the exam's cancellation and announcement of a re-examination. The student had expressed anxiety about retaking the test and the financial burden on her father.

title: Shubman Gill-Ishan Kishan stand offers a glimpse into India's 2027 ODI WC blueprint
content: Shubman Gill and Ishan Kishan's 224-run stand against Afghanistan in Lucknow was more than just a batting masterclass. In unforgiving conditions, with the temperature constantly hovering above 40 degrees, the duo showcased why the left-right combination could be central to their ODI plans heading into the 2027 World Cup.

title: Can't ask Global South to bear Iran war brunt alone: PM Modi at G7
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi highlighted the ongoing impact of West Asian crises on the Global South, urging international solidarity. He proposed a global skills partnership and an International Mobilisation Partnership for Accelerating Connectivity and Trade (IMPACT) to foster shared growth and resilience.

title: Shiv Sena (UBT) split: ‘Op Tiger’ success may strengthen Shinde’s position in NDA
content: Deputy CM Eknath Shinde's reported 'Operation Tiger' could significantly boost his political clout within the NDA and Maharashtra's Mahayuti alliance. If successful, the Shiv Sena's Lok Sabha tally could rise to 13, potentially leading to a cabinet berth and strengthening Shinde's bargaining position at the Centre, though CM Devendra Fadnavis' state position remains secure.

title: 10-match goal drought! Ronaldo endures horror show vs Congo with no shots on target
content: Cristiano Ronaldo's influence is under scrutiny following Portugal's 1-1 World Cup draw against DR Congo. The veteran forward registered minimal touches and no shots on target, extending his major tournament goalless streak to ten matches. Despite the frustrating performance, Ronaldo remains optimistic, but the team faces pressure to rebound quickly.

title: 6 women killed after racing tractors crash into e-rickshaw in UP
content: Six women were killed and three injured when two speeding tractors, allegedly racing, rammed their e-rickshaw on the Kachla-Ujhani highway in Budaun. The women were en route to a pre-wedding ritual. Police have identified the drivers, one of whom fled the scene, and are conducting raids for their arrest.

title: ‘Main vaapas aaunga’ crosses Rs 18 crore worldwide by day 6 with steady run
content: In a remarkable feat, Imtiaz Ali's much-anticipated film 'Main Vaapas Aaunga', featuring the charismatic Diljit Dosanjh, continues to captivate audiences, raking in an impressive Rs 10.05 crore at the Indian box office by day six. Positioned in a competitive release landscape, this poignant partition drama has demonstrated resilience, netting Rs 1.75 crore on day six alone. Read on to know more in detail.

title: ‘Yes, I was’: Gill admits he was chasing double hundred after battling cramps vs AFG
content: Shubman Gill's brilliant 154 powered India to a massive 402 and a series win against Afghanistan. Battling cramps, Gill revealed he aimed for a double century, emphasising his goal to convert starts into match-defining innings. The skipper expressed confidence in his current form, highlighting a dominant performance alongside Ishan Kishan.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for today - check list
content: Top stock market recommendations: Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL), Canara Bank, and TVS Motor Company - these are the top 3 stocks that Aakash K Hindocha, Vice President - Research, Nuvama Professional Clients Group/Nuvama Wealth Management has recommended.

title: Crude prices fall as US-Iran deal reopens Hormuz after over 100 days
content: Oil prices dropped significantly as the US and Iran reached an interim agreement to end the war, reopen the Strait of Hormuz, and lift sanctions on Tehran's oil. This deal, aiming to restore pre-war conditions, could resolve a major energy supply disruption and potentially lead to a global oil surplus by 2027.

title: Delhi High Court seeks government's reply as Telegram challenges ban over NEET retest
content: The Delhi High Court has asked the Centre for its response on the ban imposed on Telegram, which is challenging the temporary restriction ahead of the NEET-UG retest. The government claims to have "shocking material" to share, citing ongoing issues with channels involved in examination-related activities resurfacing after being blocked.

title: NSE files for Rs 30,000 cr IPO, to be largest ever in India
content: India's largest stock exchange, NSE, has filed for an IPO aiming to raise over Rs 30,000 crore, potentially becoming the nation's biggest public offering. This move follows years of planning, with 23 shareholders divesting nearly 15 crore shares.  Early investors like New India Assurance and National Insurance are poised for massive returns.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes oldest outfield player to start a World Cup game
content: Breaking records at the tender age of 41, Cristiano Ronaldo stepped onto the pitch as the oldest outfield player to start a World Cup match, showcasing his extraordinary career in his sixth tournament. Despite the excitement, he left the field without a goal in the 1-1 draw with DR Congo.

title: Shubman Gill surpasses MS Dhoni, enters elite India ODI list
content: Shubman Gill achieved a significant milestone by reaching 1,000 ODI runs in just 954 balls, surpassing MS Dhoni. This feat came during his brilliant 154 against Afghanistan, where he partnered with Ishan Kishan for a massive 224-run stand. Gill's century, his ninth in ODIs, was a masterclass in aggressive batting, further solidifying his status as a top modern-day Indian batter.

title: Comedy show fallout: Karnataka to issue norms on handling cadavers
content: Karnataka government will soon issue guidelines for medical students on appropriate behavior and respect towards donated bodies for study. This follows viral clips of students disrespecting cadavers, sparking a debate on ethics. The ethics committee will meet to discuss reinforcing existing guidelines for handling donated bodies.

title: Father arrested for bid to kill girl over 'transgender traits'
content: A father in Auraiya has been arrested for allegedly attempting to murder his 14-year-old transgender daughter. He reportedly beat her with a stick and threw her into a canal, motivated by her gender identity. The girl survived due to shallow water and was rescued by locals. She is in critical condition.

title: PM Modi seeks 'highest priority' for seafarers in Middle East peace deal in meeting with Trump
content: PM Modi and President Trump discussed the safety of Indian seafarers amidst a US-Iran peace agreement. Trump acknowledged the risks of the profession while Modi emphasized the importance of maritime security, particularly in the Strait of Hormuz. The leaders also touched upon trade, defense, and geopolitical issues, with Trump expressing confidence in strong US-India ties.

title: Voting for Karnataka Legislative Council polls begins
content: The ruling Congress, which has 37 members in the 75-member Upper House, is expected to achieve a majority with victory assured in four seats

title: Tamil Nadu Governor's address Live update: Rajendra Arlekar says two-language policy will continue in the State
content: DMK MLAs, led by Udhayanidhi Stalin, stage a protest outside the Tamil Nadu Assembly, raising slogans against TVK government and Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay over law and order issues

title: Supreme Court seeks Delhi Police response on bail pleas of ‘Indian Mujahideen operatives’
content: Top court notes that the January 5 judgment denying bail to Umar Khalid and Sharjeel Imam, which the HC had relied on to reject the accused’s bail pleas, has since been referred to a larger Bench

title: IIT-Delhi study finds human activity drives India’s ‘wild’ weather
content: ‘Historical rainfall statistics alone may not provide a reliable guide to future risk in a warming climate,’ a researcher said

title: Why A.P.’s incentive for having more children is misplaced
content: The recently announced cash incentives in Andhra Pradesh cannot offset the economic barriers faced by people to have larger families

title: India has scripted a new history under Modi’s 12-year tenure: Shivraj Singh Chouhan
content: Mr. Singh was in Patna to take part in several programmes organised by the State government and Bihar BJP

title: Defamation case: HC lifts stay on arrest warrant against TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee
content: The defamation suit alleged that Abhishek Banerjee called Akash Vijayvargiya a "goon" while addressing a rally in Kolkata in November 2020

title: MDMK general secretary Vaiko, representatives from NASSCOM, CTS meet CM Vijay
content: MDMK general secretary Vaiko presented a memorandum urging the government not to grant permission for a private copper smelting plant in Thoothukudi district

title: Telegram was warned about misuse before blanket ban, says NTA chief
content: Telegram founder had promised to make the ‘edited’ label more visible, but it was not done, says NTA Director-General Abhishek Singh, adding that the messaging app has to “adhere to norms”

title: Bangladesh PM’s foreign visit plans won’t cast a shadow on India-Bangladesh ties: Official sources
content: Tarique Rahman is expected to leave for his first round of foreign tours next week that will take him to Malaysia and China

title: Neither ChatGPT nor any other AI tool can be equated with a qualified teacher: Madras High Court
content: Justices S.M. Subramaniam and N. Senthilkumar say artificial intelligence cannot teach integrity and morality to students

title: PM Modi in Paris LIVE updates: Modi arrives in Paris, meets members of Indian diaspora
content: Modi is scheduled to attend VivaTech 2026 alongside French President Emmanuel Macron and interact with the Indian community

title: Messi team writes to Bidhannagar Police; blames Aroop Biswas for fiasco
content: Communication reportedly names security lapses, unscheduled interactions and the presence of unaccredited personnel at Salt Lake Stadium

title: Court frames charges against ex-TMC leader Sheikh Shahjahan, others in PMLA case: ED
content: The others against whom charges have been framed include Shahjahan’s accomplices Shib Prasad Hazra and Didar Boksh Molla. All four are currently lodged in jail under judicial custody

title: PM Modi arrives in Paris, says India-France partnership vital for global progress
content: Mr. Modi is scheduled to attend VivaTech 2026 alongside French President Emmanuel Macron and interact with the Indian community

title: Farm workers’ unions, activists announce protest from July 1 for VB-G RAM G repeal
content: NREGA Sangarsh Morcha says the new scheme will provide only 42 days of work and not 125 days as government promises; workers’ groups say the protest will continue till the law is repealed

title: Supreme Court says probe needed into ‘serious’ allegation of Registry misplacing case records
content: CJI Surya Kant says claim that records in an urgent matter went missing is a ‘very serious matter’ that warrants scrutiny

title: Supreme Court defers hearing of plea challenging NEET-UG re-test to July
content: While the re-test is scheduled for June 21, Justice Narasimha’s Bench, before which the matter is to be listed, is scheduled to sit only after July 13, effectively rendering the plea infructuous.

title: ‘Parasites’: Supreme Court denies bail to man accused of cyberfraud, calls for sterner legislation
content: Top court refuses to entertain a plea by an accused facing multiple cyberfraud cases seeking the clubbing of multiple criminal cases and the grant of bail; society’s interest is there only when you are inside jail and not outside, it says

title: After protests, three injured Kukis shifted out of Imphal hospital
content: The three youths were moved 60 km away to Churachandpur Medical College under tight security; protesters had earlier tried to storm RIMS and take away the trio who were injured in an attack on their village in Kuki-majority Kangpokpi

title: Maintenance decree binding on estate, but enhancement cannot be sought after husband’s death: Bombay HC
content: The petitioner sought the continuation of monthly maintenance from the estate of her husband, who died in 2012

title: Mamata takes to street against eviction of hawkers in W.B.
content: Since the BJP came to power to West Bengal in May 2026, there has been eviction drive against hawkers and settlers in markets and across railway stations in the State

title: Bihar Cabinet approves amendment to Direct Recruitment Rules for outstanding athletes
content: Welcoming the decision, Sports Minister Shreyasi Singh said that the Government of Bihar remains committed to the welfare, empowerment, and long-term security of sportspersons.

title: 1,000 ex-servicemen to be posted in Fire and Rescue Services: Chennithala
content: Action plan to be prepared for comprehensive modernisation of the force against the backdrop of climate change and resultant increase in disasters

title: 59-year-old man’s organs donated at Naruvi Hospitals in Vellore
content: Despite intensive treatment by a multidisciplinary medical team, Srinivasan was declared brain-dead on June 16

title: Examine feasibility of formulating regulatory framework for homestays: Karnataka High Court
content: The High Court of Karnataka has directed the State government to examine the feasibility of formulating a comprehensive policy and regulatory framework governing the establishment, operation and supervision of homestays

title: My son was killed by police, alleges mother of missing youth in Vijayawada
content: Gade Sai Krishna, who was picked up by the police a month ago, is yet to return; family members seek judicial probe, say the police should produce him before A.P. High Court

title: Stage set for Council polls in Karnataka that could give Congress majority in Upper House
content: The Congress, which now has 37 members in the 75-member Upper House, will achieve majority with wins assured in four seats. If it manages to win all the five seats it is contesting, its tally will go to 39

title: Rebuild education system to reduce cost and stress, says Rahul in Kota
content: ‘Top five competitive exams in the country have drained the energy of the youth and financial resources of middle-class families’

title: Vellappally terms IUML a communal outfit in a secular garb
content: In a signed editorial in Yoga Nadam, Vellappally reiterates his accusation, made ahead of the Assembly election, that the IUML is a “true blue communal party wearing a secular garb”. He claimed that “divisive forces were gunning for the SNDP Yogam, and the social organisation can ill-afford to remain muted when “political parties in power cradle a communal outfit”

title: Nibe Ltd demonstrates Garudastra mortar system at Infantry School Mhow
content: The trial highlighted the system’s rapid deployment ability, high rate of fire, MRSI capability, and GPS and laser-guided munitions

title: Bangladesh PM’s adviser was stopped at Delhi airport as his name was on ‘blacklist’
content: Zahed Ur Rahman, Information & Broadcasting Adviser of Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman was allowed by the immigration to enter India but he chose to return from the airport in Delhi, say sources

title: Two properties of key terror accused attached in J&K’s Baramulla: NIA
content: Officials say the attachment was carried out under Section 33 (1) of UA (P) Act, pursuant to the orders of NIA Special Court, Jammu

title: ED questions Veena for around 8 hours in CMRL pay-off case
content: ED is learnt to have asked her about the payments amounting to ₹2.78 crore made by CMRL to her now-defunct Exalogic IT company. The ED also raised questions on the loans worth ₹50 lakh extended to Exalogic by a firm operated by CMRL Managing Director S.N. Sasidharan Kartha, despite her company failing to make timely repayments

title: MAHE to sponsor 50 houses to be donated to meritorious students and Yakshagana artists, says Ranjan Pai
content: He lauded the gesture of the Kalaranga in getting houses constructed and donated to poor meritorious students and Yakshagana artists without any fanfare

title: On Camera, Drunk KTM Duke Rider Crashes Into Divider In Hyderabad, Dies
content: According to the police, the rider was allegedly under the influence of alcohol and speeding when he lost control of the vehicle and rammed into a small advertisement board installed on the road median.

title: "This Was Not Easy": Trump As He Signs Deal To End US-Iran War
content: A video showed Macron - who was seated next to Trump, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio - who was standing behind Trump, and other guests applauding.

title: Mythos A Weapon, Needs Gun License, Testers Warned Anthropic: Report
content: Mythos 5 and Fable 5, Anthropic's most advanced and capable AI models were pulled just three days after release.

title: NSE Files For Rs 30,000 Crore IPO, India's Biggest-Ever Public Issue Yet
content: NSE has appointed 20 merchant bankers, besides legal advisors and other intermediaries, to manage the proposed public issue.

title: Explained: Why India, Pak Never Target Each Other's Nuclear Installations
content: This restraint is not accidental. It is rooted in a formal bilateral agreement that stands as one of the most durable confidence-building measures in the fragile South Asian region.

title: Nuclear, Hormuz, Sanctions: Challenges In The Way Of US-Iran Deal
content: When U.S. and Iranian negotiators sit down in Switzerland on Friday after nearly four months of war, the stakes couldn’t be higher as they face an

title: US-Iran Sign Deal To End War. Read Full Text Of 14-Point Agreement
content: US and Iran have commited to negotiating and achieving the final deal in maximum 60 days extendable with mutual consent.

title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: US, Iran Sign Peace Deal, 60-Day Negotiating Clock Starts Ticking
content: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

title: Security Operations In Manipur Intensified Amid Protests Over Recent Deaths
content: Manipur security forces intensify operations amid protests over Kuki patients and civilian death claims.

title: Your iPhone Is About To Get Expensive. Tim Cook Explains Why
content: Apple plans to raise prices on its products to offset increasing memory and storage chip costs, CEO Tim Cook told the Wall Street Journal in an interview. A surge in AIdriven

title: Not Just Netflix, Indians Are Now Subscribing To Furniture, Home Appliances
content: Instead of one-time sales, companies are maintaining an ongoing relationship with customers throughout a product's lifecycle with subscription model.

title: 19-Year-Old NEET Aspirant Dies By Suicide In Tamil Nadu's Coimbatore
content: Police identified the student as Anunkeerthana, who had already appeared for NEET twice and was preparing to take the examination again.

title: "Nobody Did That On Purpose": Trump On Iran School Strike That Killed 170
content: LESBAINS, France, June 17 (Reuters)  U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that "nobody" purposefully attacked a girls' school in Iran in February, citing an investigation into the

title: Man Shot Dead In Delhi Over Old Rivalry, 4 Arrested: Cops
content: A 42-year-old man was shot dead allegedly by four people over an old family rivalry in south Delhi's Sangam Vihar area on Wednesday, with all the accused later arrested, police said.

title: Gauhati Court Overturns Death Sentence, Acquits Man In 2018 Rape-Murder Case
content: The Gauhati High Court has acquitted a man who spent nearly eight years on death row for the alleged rape and murder of an 11-year-old girl in Assam's Nagaon district.

title: Weather Live Updates: Delhi Records Below-Normal Temperatures, Air Quality Satisfactory
content: Weather Today, Delhi-NCR Rain Alert Live Updates: Delhi stays pleasant with temperatures below normal and AQI in satisfactory range

title: Mamata Banerjee sends back new guards assigned to her
content: the govt replaced the personal security officers assigned to former CM Mamata Banerjee for nearly two decades . she said the party arranged for two private security guards . the issue came to light after the state’s directorate of security did not immediately comment .

title: Rahul tells Kota aspirants to break free of engineer-doctor-IAS template
content: Congress MP Rahul Gandhi waded into india's high-pressure exam culture . urged students to dream beyond the familiar career script of engineer, doctor, lawyer, IAS or armed forces, while branding the education system a 'rejection system' he said: "this is not a political meeting. This is a meeting about you, about young people struggling to get a future"

title: Mohan Bhagwat says Maharana Pratap won Haldighati, questions historical narrative
content: RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat reignited the long-running debate over the Battle of Haldighati . he asserted that Maharana Pratap emerged victorious in the 1576 conflict and accuses historians of constructing narrative that understates his resistance to Mughal rule .

title: Lok Sabha speaker to hear Abhishek tomorrow on split in TMC
content: sources say the party has received an email from the Speaker’s office . abhishek will be travelling to Delhi to meet Birla at parliament House on friday . the development comes amid a demand by 20 rebel TMC MPs to recognise them as a separate group after their merger with nationalist Citizens Party of India .

title: UBT Sena heads for revolt 2.0 as 6 of 9 MPs write to Lok Sabha Speaker Birla
content: 'Operation Tiger' or the process of getting the six MPs on its side had been completed, sources say . 'there is no point in discussing this. I will not go anywhere for any rebel MPs' list,' says LS Speaker .
